issues.description: Effect targets 'OwnLeader' but card text specifies 'Up to 1 of your [Nico Robin] Leader' — requires condition to filter for Nico Robin leader specifically
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and condition 'Always' is unexplained in card text — DrawCard and TrashFromHand actions have no corresponding game rule or text
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'during this turn' — should be 'DuringYourTurn'

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Up to 1 of your [Nico Robin] Leader gains +3000 power during this turn.
